debate.host: NJ Globe + Rider University's Rebovich Institute
debate.note: Only one debate occurred. Mejia initially refused the League of Women Voters debate (cancelled March 20). Bond was excluded.

exchanges.mejia_position: Supports $25 minimum wage, free public college, student loan cancellation to address affordability
exchanges.hathaway_position: Supports lower taxes, tax freeze for first-time homebuyers, capping student loan interest rates
Opposes Medicare for All; supports One Big Beautiful Bill
exchanges.key_quote: ACA subsidy removal was a key point of contention
Immigration enforcement was a sharp dividing line between candidates

exchanges.mejia_position: Condition aid on human rights. Called Netanyahu a war criminal.
exchanges.hathaway_position: Unconditional aid to Israel. Attacked Mejia as antisemitic for calling Netanyahu a war criminal.
exchanges.key_quote: Hathaway attacked Mejia as antisemitic for calling Netanyahu a war criminal

exchanges.hathaway_position: Supports One Big Beautiful Bill; lower taxes
exchanges.key_quote: Hathaway supports One Big Beautiful Bill; Mejia opposes it
Both agree Gateway Tunnel is critical (rare common ground)
War with Iran was among the key issues debated

exchanges.mejia_position: Called Hathaway a 'rubber stamp for Trump'
exchanges.hathaway_position: Self-described 'new generation Republican.' Acknowledged Biden won 2020. Would oppose Trump third term.
exchanges.key_quote: Mejia called Hathaway 'wolf in sheep's clothing,' a 'rubber stamp for Trump'
